mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_sent_log ("to", cc, bcc, subject, content, attachment, send_time, is_success) VALUES (#{to}, #{cc}, #{bcc}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{attachment}, #{sendTime}, #{isSuccess})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_sent_log SET "to" = #{to}, cc = #{cc}, bcc = #{bcc}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, attachment = #{attachment}, send_time = #{sendTime}, is_success = #{isSuccess} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, "to", cc, bcc, subject, content, attachment, send_time AS sendTime, is_success AS isSuccess FROM email_sent_log ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT id, "to", cc, bcc, subject, content, attachment, send_time AS sendTime, is_success AS isSuccess FROM email_sent_log WHERE is_success = #{isSuccess} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT id, "to", cc, bcc, subject, content, attachment, send_time AS sendTime, is_success AS isSuccess FROM email_sent_log WHERE send_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_sent_log WHERE is_success = #{isSuccess}
